summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sophie Aigroz Psychology website. Backend API working perfectly (100% success rate), frontend fully functional with excellent form integration. Minor mobile navigation issue detected but core functionality intact.

ui_bugs.issue: Some mobile menu links timeout after first interaction (Approche, Contact links)

design_issues.issue: Mobile menu button not visible at tablet size (768px) - may need responsive breakpoint adjustment

passed_tests: Contact form submission and database integration
Navigation links scroll to correct sections
Contact form fields and dropdown work properly
Form success message and reset functionality
Responsive design across multiple screen sizes
All page sections display correctly (Hero, Services, Approach, Contact, Footer)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all core functionality working, minor mobile nav issue)
